sample_prompts: attach the ear to the positive X side of the head
seat this horn onto the top surface of the skull with a tiny gap
przymocuj ucho do dodatniej strony X głowy
osadz ten element na górnej powierzchni korpusu
description: Bounded macro that seats one part onto another object's surface/body using one explicit surface axis, one side, shared tangential alignment, optional gap, and one deterministic transform. Use align_mode=none to preserve the current tangential offsets while seating along the surface normal. For mesh-surface gaps after bbox seating, it can apply a bounded nearest-point mesh nudge up to max_mesh_nudge. Prefer this macro over the more general macro_relative_layout when the intent is surface attachment.
